REMOVED FROM SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-25-2002 - CASE SETTLED. PRESENT: COMMISSIONER LORETTA M. NORRIS; CLERK: P. DIAS; REPORTER: JUNE LEATHLEY.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT SIEDCHEK, MARTHA

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PAPAZIAN, EMMY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DOBBS, BELINDA G THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2 ALLSTON WAY SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL FEB-14-2003, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY EXECUTION OF JUDGMENT THROUGH 2/14/03. WRIT MAY ISSUE FORTHWITH. IF DEFT. PAYS $1,250.00 ON OR BEFORE 2/14/03 THE MOVE OUT DATE WILL BE EXTENDED TO 2/28/03. NO FURTHER EXTENSIONS BEYOND THE 2/28/03 DATE TO BE GIVEN. IF DEFT. VACATES PRIOR TO THE ORIGINAL MOVE DATE OF 2/14/03 OR BEFORE THE EXTENDED MOVE OUT DATE , PLTF'S. ATTY. TO EXECUTE STIPULATION FOR ORDER TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. THERE IS A MUTUAL AND GENERAL RELEASE. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-27-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Cause assigned to Dept. 218 for Settlement Conference. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: June Leathley. Joseph A. Sacramento, Esq. appeared for Plaintiff, Emmy Papazian and Defendant Belinda G. Dobbs appeared in pro per. The matter settled per stipulation of the parties which is read into the record.
